description_long: This handgun features a striking custom finish with a vivid red dragon motif winding along the slide and grip, set against a background of cream, tan, and black marbling. The pistol is equipped with a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, which is also decorated with the same marbled pattern. The grip is contoured and visually textured, with the dragon's scales providing a unique tactile appearance. The trigger and trigger guard are both visible, with the guard being rounded and robust. The slide is smooth with no visible manufacturer markings, but the decorative artwork dominates the visual impression. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, blending artistic elements with functional firearm features.
description: A modern handgun with a dramatic red dragon design, marbled cream and black finish, and a long suppressor. The grip and slide are visually textured with the dragon motif.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular suppressor and a hint of the dragon design wrapping around the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full red dragon artwork along the slide and grip, as well as the marbled suppressor and detailed trigger area.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip and slide, with the dragon's tail and scales visible, and the slim profile of the suppressor.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the marbled finish on the slide and grip, with less of the dragon visible, and the suppressor extending forward.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a visually textured surface created by the red dragon's scales wrapping around it. The grip appears to be made of polymer with a glossy finish, and the dragon motif adds both visual and tactile interest. There are no visible finger grooves, but the curvature suggests a comfortable hold. The base of the grip is decorated with the dragon's tail, and there are no visible logos or additional embellishments beyond the artwork.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth, slightly thickened profile. It lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges, maintaining a classic oval shape. There is no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the design is clean, focusing attention on the decorative finish rather than structural embellishments.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, which extends well beyond the slide. The suppressor is decorated with the same marbled cream and black pattern as the rest of the handgun. There are no visible ports, fluting, or compensator cuts, and the exterior is smooth and unmarked.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only prominent markings are the decorative red dragon artwork and marbled background, which cover the entire slide surface.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, following the contour of the grip's end. It is decorated with the dragon's tail and marbled pattern, with no visible finger rest, flaring, or texturing. The design is visually seamless with the rest of the grip.
